calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Failure To File Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-12-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: MICHAEL BERTINETTI, ESQ., SEVERSON & WERSON, 415.398.3344, FOR DEFENDANTS AMERICA'S WHOLESALE LENDER, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., RECONTRUST COMPANY NA, THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS AMERICA'S WHOLESALE LENDER, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., RECONTRUST COMPANY NA, THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON'S Motion To Dismiss For Failure To File Amended Complaint is off calendar. A Dismissal of the Entire Action filed on June 12, 2012. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-05-2012 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follow: DEFENDANT AMERICA'S WHOLESALE LENDER, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., BANK OF AMERICA,N.A., AS SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO, THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON AKA, RECONTRUST COMPANY NA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend as to 2nd , 3rd and 11th causes of action to allege tender. Grant without leave to amend 1st, 4th to 10th causes of action, no opposition filed. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, not reported. (501/REQ)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-11-2012 Continued To Jun-14-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance. Tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT AMERICA'S WHOLESALE LENDER, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., BANK OF AMERICA,N.A., AS SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO, THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON AKA, RECONTRUST COMPANY NA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to June 14, 2012 opposing party to provide courtesy copy of opposition by May 18, 2012. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Not reported (D501)
